raw_response: The Sony over-ear wireless headphones offer excellent value for your budget and commuting needs. With a mid-range price point and impressive 50-hour battery life, they provide reliable performance on the go. Good noise cancellation helps block out distractions during commutes, while LDAC codec support ensures high-quality audio. Though not class-leading in build quality or ANC, these headphones are still comfortable and foldable for easy storage.
